flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Walsh University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.3k vs 1.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Walsh University rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.8k → $21.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Walsh University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.3k → $35.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Walsh University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
